a:r.a:t: We will work as one team, collaborating closely throughout the project
We create a core team that integrates all input and drives analyses and day-to-day work
McKinsey experts will provide content support, outside-in examples, and any required guidance on specific analyses. We will also invite stakeholders to discuss insights at half-day workshops
egular progress updates and make critical decisions in review meetings with CLIENT and McKinsey leadership
1. Example; further experts added as required
